scores.notes: The OCR output has several issues: text accuracy is compromised by missing spaces and some misspellings (e.g., 'tocelebrate' instead of 'to celebrate'). Table structure is not well-preserved, as the content is not clearly organized into tables. Numeric precision is relatively high, but there are some inconsistencies in formatting. Layout preservation is moderate, with some sections and headers not clearly maintained. Completeness is decent, but some parts of the text are garbled or missing.
